system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.mes_dinhmuc_govan_copy","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[MES_DINHMUC_GOVAN_COPY]
(
	@fromProduct nvarchar(200),
	@toProduct nvarchar(200),
	@ngaytao datetime,
	@nguoitao nvarchar(50),
	@ngaysua datetime,
	@nguoisua nvarchar(50)
)
AS
BEGIN TRY
	BEGIN TRANSACTION

	-- XÓA CÁC DỮ LIỆU CỦA MÃ MỚI
	DELETE mes_dinhmuc_govan_ghichu WHERE masp_nhamay = @toProduct;
	DELETE mes_dinhmuc_govan WHERE masp = @toProduct;
	DELETE mes_quytrinh_sanpham WHERE masp = @toProduct;

	-- COPY ĐỊNH MỨC GỖ VÁN
	INSERT INTO mes_dinhmuc_govan
	(
		masp, mact, stt, chitiet, nguyenlieu, id_nguyenlieu,
		dayy_tc, rong_tc, dai_tc, soluong_tc, m3_tc, m2_tc,
		dayy_sc, rong_sc, dai_sc, soluong_sc, m3_sc,
		ghichu, hoanthanh, mong1, mong2,
		veneer_matchinh, veneer_matphu, veneer_dan_canh,
		uv_matchinh, uv_matphu, uv_canhdai, uv_canhngan,
		uv_matchinh1, uv_matphu1, uv_canhdai1, uv_canhngan1,
		veneer_canhdai, veneer_canhngan,
		ngaytao, nguoitao, ngaysua, nguoisua,
		banve
	)
	SELECT @toProduct as masp, mact, stt, chitiet, nguyenlieu, id_nguyenlieu,
		   dayy_tc, rong_tc, dai_tc, soluong_tc, m3_tc, m2_tc,
		   dayy_sc, rong_sc, dai_sc, soluong_sc, m3_sc,
		   ghichu, hoanthanh, mong1, mong2,
		   veneer_matchinh, veneer_matphu, veneer_dan_canh,
		   uv_matchinh1, uv_matphu1, uv_canhdai1, uv_canhngan1,
		   uv_matchinh, uv_matphu, uv_canhdai, uv_canhngan,
		   veneer_canhdai, veneer_canhngan,
		   @ngaytao, @nguoitao, @ngaysua, @nguoisua,
		   banve
	FROM mes_dinhmuc_govan
	WHERE masp = @fromProduct

	-- COPY GHI CHÚ
	DECLARE @mausac nvarchar(200) = '';
	SELECT @mausac = masp_mausac
	FROM mes_dinhmuc_govan_ghichu 
	WHERE masp_nhamay = @fromProduct
	ORDER BY LEN(ghichu) DESC

	DECLARE @mact nvarchar(50) = '';
	DECLARE @ghichu nvarchar(max) = '';
	DECLARE CUR CURSOR LOCAL FOR
		SELECT mact, ghichu FROM mes_dinhmuc_govan_ghichu
		WHERE masp_nhamay = @fromProduct AND masp_mausac = @mausac
	OPEN CUR
	FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @mact, @ghichu
	WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
	BEGIN
		DECLARE CUR_GHICHU CURSOR LOCAL FOR
		SELECT DISTINCT mausac FROM tr_sanpham 
		WHERE masp_nhamay = @toProduct 
		ORDER BY mausac
		OPEN CUR_GHICHU
		FETCH NEXT FROM CUR_GHICHU INTO @mausac
		WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
		BEGIN
			INSERT INTO mes_dinhmuc_govan_ghichu(id, masp_nhamay, masp_mausac, mact, ghichu)
			VALUES (NEWID(), @toProduct, @mausac, @mact, @ghichu)
			FETCH NEXT FROM CUR_GHICHU INTO @mausac
		END
		CLOSE CUR_GHICHU;
		DEALLOCATE CUR_GHICHU;

		FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @mact, @ghichu
	END
	CLOSE CUR;
	DEALLOCATE CUR;

	COMMIT TRANSACTION
END TRY
BEGIN CATCH
	ROLLBACK TRANSACTION
END CATCH","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.cur","dbo.cur_ghichu","dbo.mes_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.mes_dinhmuc_govan_ghichu","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":["dbo.mes_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.mes_dinhmuc_govan_ghichu","dbo.mes_quytrinh_sanpham"],"flags":["has-transaction","has-try-catch","has-cursor","has-while","writes-multi-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
